title: Assertion error  in rel_rename_exps (sqlsmith)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, NULL), (3, 'test3');
CREATE TABLE related_table (ref_id INTEGER, description LONG VARCHAR, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT t.id, t.value, r.description FROM test_table t LEFT JOIN related_table r ON t.id = r.ref_id WHERE t.value IS NOT NULL OR r.description IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Assertion error in complex subquery with null checks
